stemHtml: The crew plans a short flight departing from a small airfield that has no ICAO identifier and intends to return shortly afterward. What information must be inserted in Flight Plan Item 13?

options.a: //// in ITEM 13 with departure airfield name in ITEM18
options.b: XXXX in ITEM 13 with the name of the airfield name in ITEM 18
options.c: ZZZZ in ITEM 13 with the name of the airfield name in ITEM 18
options.d: AAAA in ITEM 13 with the name of the airfield in ITEM 18
